_note: Per-content-type evaluation-configuration SoT — which craft criteria, thresholds/params, and completion counts apply to which page. Three sub-forms (each content-type keeps only what it needs): `checks` = per-criterion fixed thresholds (the orchestrator calls the criterion's algorithm function directly) · `bundles` = a single call to a relational, wiki-wide combined bundle (skill.<fn>, `produces` = the criterion IDs it emits; wiki-wide state and shared parsing are injected by the orchestrator) · `roster` = a full enumeration of evaluated criteria (required/optional; `_manifest_counts` derives the completion count — replacing the _rubric.py table parse). Criterion definitions, comparators, and rationale SoT live in .claude/skills/<skill>/criteria.json (dotted IDs); structural and house-style criteria with no external craft source (struct.*/house.*) live in the structural section of layers/<content-type>.md. Content-type order follows the Layer order (L2-1 source → L2-2 hub → L2-3/4 overview → L2-3/4 contradiction).

source._note: L2-1 source page. The verifiable-attribution craft cit.* (G1–G5 · C1–C3 · A1–A3) is measured entirely by the scholarly-citation `evaluate_citation` bundle. Wiki-wide state (page_index, section titles) is injected by the orchestrator (source.py).

hub._note: L2-2 hub body density and `## Connections` grouping (the encyclopedic nav-anchor style) → encyclopedia-writing. central_anchor (an entity, or inbound ≥ CENTRALITY_EXEMPT) is exempt; inbound is wiki-wide so it is injected by the orchestrator (hub_body.py). The body floor (MIN_BODY_CHARS) and frontmatter schema remain structural in hub_schema.py. Advisory check.

timeline._note: L2-2 standalone timeline (wiki/timelines/<slug>.md). A source-indexed chronology — a path overlay parallel to a trail. If the first link of a dated entry is [[source-id]], the overlay is classified as a path (members = the ordered source nodes). The structural criteria (schema-sections, source-indexed) are defined in the structural section of timeline.md and measured automatically by timeline.py — source-indexed = src_n > hub_n, the same test as the builder's overlays.py:_timeline_overlay (a regression guard for the region logic). Sourceless historical anchors stay as [[entity]] (lossless). The raw source-id kebab slug of a dated entry is exempt from enc.slug-alias because indexing is its purpose (the key difference from a trail). The flow-summary trajectory narrative = enc.summary-style (manual; Desk VERIFY₂). broken-link is delegated to graph structure. roster = completion count.

overview-cluster._note: L2-3 cluster overview. Craft: jrn (the landscape narrative) · con (Executive Summary, figures) · enc (links, notation, neutrality) · cit (schema meta). Structural and house-style criteria with no external craft source (struct.*/house.*) are defined in the structural section of overview.md. checks = fixed-threshold craft; roster = completion count (out of 30).

overview-aggregate._note: L2-4 root overview. Shares the cluster checks + aggregate bundles (D1 con.mece-clusters · D2 enc.summary-style · F1 enc.coatrack · D3 jrn.due-impartiality). Shared parsing (section_spans, all_links, theme_stems) is injected by the orchestrator (overview.py). Structural and house-style criteria share the structural section of overview.md Part 1 (scope = aggregate). roster = completion count (out of 29).

contradiction-theme._note: L2-3 theme contradiction. cit.* (L2·L3·L4·G1·G2) → scholarly-citation · enc.* (N1·N2·N5·N7·W1·L1·X2) → encyclopedia-writing · jrn.* (T1·T3·T4·D1·D2·D5·D6) → journalism-writing. Structural criteria with no external craft source (N3·D4·S1·S2·S3·X1) and house-style criteria (N4·N6, recurring) are defined in the structural and house-style sections of contradiction.md (no craft ID assigned). The bundles get wiki-wide state (sources_dir) and shared parsing (claim_sources, evidence_slugs, conflict_section) injected by the orchestrator. checks = G1·G2 schema meta-use (fixed thresholds). roster = completion count (out of 28).

contradiction-aggregate._note: L2-4 aggregate contradiction. con (D1 MECE axes) · enc (N1·N2·N5·N7·D2·D3·F1·W1) · jrn (T1·T4) · cit (G1·G2 schema meta-use). Structural criteria (N3·S1·S2·X1·F2, self-aggregated) remain in the structural section of contradiction.md. Shared parsing (insights, the analysis section, all_links, axes_named) is injected by the orchestrator. checks = G1·G2 (fixed thresholds). roster = completion count (out of 19).

synthesis._note: L2-3 Q-A synthesis (wiki/syntheses/<slug>.md). Craft-selection rationale (compared against the exemplar ai-coding-evolution): summary = jrn.lede · con.scr (a conclusion-first SCR for the question) · jrn.page (tension framing) · analysis section = jrn.explainer · con.bold-bullet · inline source attribution in the body = cit.grounding (a synthesis uses no typed prefixes, so cit.cite-consistency does not apply) · the per-axis `## Connections` roster = enc.connection-grouping · notation and neutrality = enc.*. Structural criteria with no external craft source (schema-sections, source-coverage, source-exists, through-line) and house-style criteria live in the structural section of synthesis.md. Automatic measurement is limited to the structural criteria + enc.slug-alias (synthesis.py); the craft criteria are manual (Desk VERIFY₂). roster = completion count.

trail._note: L2-3 associative trail (wiki/trails/<slug>.md). Memex trail-blazing. Craft-selection rationale (compared against the exemplar ai-coding-rapid-evolution): the per-hop commentary in `## Path` = jrn.explainer · enc.first-mention · enc.slug-alias · the through-line narrative in `## Commentary` = jrn.kicker (the closing insight — being a navigational essay, the con.scr business-document structure does not fit and is excluded) · enc.verdict-restraint. The structural criteria (schema-sections, path-links, path-length, through-line) live in the structural section of trail.md. The frontmatter carries `created` only (no last_updated/sources — accepted as is). Automatic measurement covers the structural criteria + enc.slug-alias (trail.py); the craft criteria are manual (Desk). roster = completion count.
